form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Sr4) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 10 m by Lulu Lucifer (2:17.90) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on April 5 at $61. Before that 9th (Fr1) over 2138m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 30 m by Brian Christopher (2:35.90) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 50 on March 27 at $34. Has the task ahead.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 22 m by Lulu Lucifer (2:17.90) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on April 5 at $17. Two runs back 5th (Fr3) over 2138m at Albion Park, beaten 7 m by Brian Christopher (2:35.90) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 50 on March 27 at $2.80. Wait until the form picks up.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (10m Fr2) over 2200m at Marburg beaten 4.5 m by Martin Magic (2:46.20) in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $18. The run before 7th (Fr5) over 1660m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 15 m by Oakley Shard (1:55.90) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $41. Can do a lot better in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 35 m by Miss Froufrou (1:55.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $13. form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 9 m by Warrawee Flyer (1:57.50) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 50 on April 7 at $19. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 5 m win as favourite (Sr2) at Albion Park (1:58.80) beating Malibu Dream in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on March 30 at $2.20. Best form puts him right in this.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 2200m after racing wide at Marburg, well beaten by The Blingster (2:41.80) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on March 15 at $34. At the start before good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 3 m by Rosie Pollen (2:09.80) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 52 on February 18 at $71. Sure to improve on the latest effort.
